attributedDescription.content:
Add another layer to your internet privacy toolkit. Get an exclusive deal on Private Internet Access VPN today at https://www.piavpn.com/LTT

GO BUY STUFF AT LTTSTORE AND GET FREE SHIPPING!
US: https://lmg.gg/shipstormus
WW: https://lmg.gg/shipstormww
$150 Minimum for US and Canada
$225 Minimum worldwide

If you want to get an even better offer, sign up for our Supporter Plus tier on floatplane at: https://www.lmg.gg/floatplane

Cluvens is back with another insane product! Meet the M2HB .50 Cal BMG Ultimate Gaming Cockpit—a steel beast with two big friggin' guns. Is this massive, 770-pound, Starship Troopers-esque rig worth the $4,800 price tag, or is it just the coolest-looking and stupidest gaming chair we've ever tested? 

Discuss on the forum: https://linustechtips.com/topic/16365...

Check out the chair here (if you dare): https://cluvens.com/m2hb-gaming-chair...

Check out our Channel Partners:
Secretlab - Grab a TITAN Evo ergonomic gaming chair:  https://lmg.gg/secretlabltt
PIA - Get the VPN of our choice: https://www.piavpn.com/ltt
dbrand - Buy a "Circuit" series skin for your device: https://dbrand.com/pcb

► SHOP LTT PRODUCTS: https://lttstore.com
► GET EXCLUSIVE CONTENT ON FLOATPLANE: https://lmg.gg/lttfloatplane
► DIVE DEEPER ON THE LTT LABS WEBSITE: https://lmg.gg/labs
► SPONSORS, AFFILIATES, AND PARTNERS: https://lmg.gg/partners

Purchases made through some store links may provide some compensation to Linus Media Group. Affiliate links powered in part by https://affilimate.com/?aid=ghz1izbpb

Linus Sebastian is an investor in Framework Computer, Inc and HexOS by Eshtek.

CHAPTERS
---------------------------------------------------
0:00 Intro
0:45 Sponsor Spot
1:42 The unboxing
6:35 Elijah’s Thoughts
7:21 Building the Chair
9:59 “The Crying Room”
10:10 More Building and Mounting the GUNS
12:46 It’s assembled and ready for action
18:03 Testing it out!
23:00 Sponsor Spot and Outro

merchandiseItemRenderer.title: Schrödinger’s Cat Patch Hoodie Small
merchandiseItemRenderer.description: We covered the LTX logo with a cat patch.So now the logo both exists and doesn’t exist. Science! All-day comfortMade with 100% cotton for a soft touch and French terry interior that's both comfortable and breathable. Unmistakably LTTOf course there’s a pocket for your phone or earbuds!

collapsedTitle.simpleText: Linus Tech Tips assembles the M2HB 50-cal BMG gaming cockpit, an industrial-style workstation featuring integrated monitors and prop machine guns. The team evaluates the ergonomics, build quality, and setup process of this sci-fi inspired desk solution to see if it functions as a practical environment for PC gaming.

text.content: Linus Tech Tips assembles the M2HB 50-cal BMG gaming cockpit, an industrial-style workstation featuring integrated monitors and prop machine guns. The team evaluates the ergonomics, build quality, and setup process of this sci-fi inspired desk solution to see if it functions as a practical environment for PC gaming.
